subcodes.first_line: O divine herald! Thy recent letter was received, and its contents bespoke the attraction of hearts, notwithstanding these tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیر ربانی تحریر اخیر واصل گردید و مفاد انجذاب فواد بود که با وجود این بلایا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
